title: Stack Items Vertically
description: Create a flex container that stacks 4 items vertically with a gap of 1rem.
instructions:
1. Create a flex container
2. Add 4 child items
3. Use flex-direction to stack them vertically
4. Add gap: 1rem
validation: Items should stack vertically with 1rem gap.

title: Footer with Column and Row
description: Create a footer layout with copyright on the left and links on the right using mixed flex-direction.
instructions:
1. Create a footer container (row)
2. Add copyright text (left section)
3. Add link items in a row sub-container
4. Use justify-content: space-between
hints: Nest a row container inside the footer for links
validation: Copyright on left, links on right, both in a row.

title: Responsive Navigation with Direction Change
description: Create a navigation that switches from row on desktop to column on mobile.
instructions:
1. Create a nav container
2. Add 5 nav links
3. Use flex-direction: row by default
4. At 600px breakpoint, switch to column
5. Add gaps and styling
hints: Use a media query for the breakpoint
Change only flex-direction in the media query
validation: Row layout on desktop (>600px), column on mobile (<600px).
